recommendations.overview: A young cobra and his scorpion best friend go on a journey across the Sahara desert to save a new-found love.

recommendations.overview: A small group of French students are studying Mao, trying to find out their position in the world and how to change the world to a Maoistic community using terrorism.

recommendations.overview: A news anchor, a comedian, an actress, and a soccer player with big egos have to travel across the globe to meet the Malawa tribe for a TV show.
